nodes.context: African American street gang based in Chicago, affiliated with People Nation, involved in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, murder.
Alliance of street gangs under a five-point star banner, including Vice Lords, Black P Stones, Latin Kings, Mickey Cobras, Four Corner Hustlers.
Rival gang to the Mickey Cobras.
Rival gang to the Mickey Cobras.
Predecessor gang to the Mickey Cobras, formed in 1954 on Chicago's West Side.
Gang that later became the Vice Lords, fought with Egyptian Cobras in the 1950s.
Gang that emerged from the 14th Street Clovers, became dominant in Lawndale by 1958.
Gang alliance that included the Cobras in the Main 21 alliance.
Organized crime group linked to the Mickey Cobras via Mickey Cogwell.
Rival alliance to People Nation, listed as rival in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The Mickey Cobras are a gang based in Chicago and affiliated with People Nation.
edges.context: Mickey Cobras are a member of the People Nation alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Some of their rivals would be Gangster Disciples
edges.context: Gangster Disciples are rivals of the Mickey Cobras.

edges.evidence_quote: Some of their rivals would be Gangster Disciples , Black Disciples
edges.context: Black Disciples are rivals of the Mickey Cobras.

edges.evidence_quote: During the mid-1950s the Egyptian Cobras fought heavily with a gang called the 14th Street Clovers.
edges.context: Egyptian Cobras fought with the 14th Street Clovers in the mid-1950s.

edges.evidence_quote: the 14th Street Clovers were the gang that later became the Vice Lords in the late 1950s.
edges.context: The Vice Lords emerged from the 14th Street Clovers.

edges.evidence_quote: When the Vice Lords returned to Lawndale in the year 1958, they soon swelled into a force to be reckoned with. The Vice Lords were very aggressive and the dominant gang in Lawndale.
edges.context: The Vice Lords became dominant over the Egyptian Cobras after returning to Lawndale.

edges.evidence_quote: The Cobras and the Black P. Stone Nation allied against the Disciple Alliance and later the Gangster Nation.
edges.context: The Cobras (then Cobras Stones) allied with Black P. Stone Nation against common enemies.

edges.evidence_quote: the commander of the Gang Intelligence Unit for the Chicago Police Department portrayed Cogwell as the link between gangs and organized crime , particularly the Chicago Outfit .
edges.description: Mickey Cogwell was portrayed as a link between the Mickey Cobras and the Chicago Outfit.

edges.context: Folk Nation is listed as a rival in the infobox.
